beats.narration: A thickness gauge is a small pulse-echo instrument: it times an echo, does the arithmetic, displays one confident number.

payload.title: THICKNESS GAUGING
payload.sub: Every digit rests on measured time and assumed velocity.

beats.narration: Thickness is velocity times time over two — the two because sound travels down and back. In steel, eight point four five microseconds reads twenty-five millimeters.

payload.heading: The whole gauge is one formula
payload.note: DOWN AND BACK — SO DIVIDE BY TWO

beats.narration: Three modes. Mode one, pulse to first back echo. Mode two, from a delay-line echo. Mode three, between back echoes — coating drops out.

payload.heading: Where the stopwatch starts and stops

beats.narration: Now the traps. Doubling displays twice the true wall. In mode one, paint reads as extra steel — go echo to echo. Hot steel reads thick.
So the rule: zero the probe, calibrate on two known steps, verify a third — a gauge is only as honest as its setup.

payload.sub: A gauge is only as honest as its setup.
